items.name: utils
items.title: Utils
items.description: The cn helper for merging Tailwind classes.

items.name: folder-component
items.title: Folder Component
items.description: An animated folder whose cards fan out on hover and lift open on click, with a 3D-tilted flap. Supports color and size (sm/md/lg) props.

items.name: bounce-sidebar
items.title: Bounce Sidebar
items.description: A vertical navigation list with a bouncy, spring-animated active indicator.

items.name: family drawer
items.title: Family Drawer
items.description: A drawer that opens from the right side of the screen, with a family tree structure inside. It supports color and size (sm/md/lg) props.

items.name: proximity-sidebar
items.title: Proximity Sidebar
items.description: A dash-style scroll sidebar whose items expand as the pointer approaches.

items.name: duration-picker
items.title: Duration Picker
items.description: A gooey, spring-animated picker for entering a duration in hours and minutes.

items.name: fluid-orb
items.title: Fluid Orb
items.description: An animated WebGL orb with drifting fluid shading. Supports size and color props.

items.name: scroll-progress
items.title: Scroll Progress
items.description: A scroll progress pill that tracks reading position and expands into a squircle menu of sections you can jump to.
